---
title: "HiBayES: A Hierarchical Bayesian Modeling Framework for AI Evaluation Statistics"
description: "arXiv, 2025"
date: 2025-01-01
venue: "arXiv"
citation-text: "Lennart Luettgau*, Harry Coppock*, Magda Dubois, Christopher Summerfield, Cozmin Ududec, HiBayES: A Hierarchical Bayesian Modeling Framework for AI Evaluation Statistics, arXiv, 2025"
---
